elements.original_description: A person stands at a crossroads, one path labeled 'Work' and the other labeled 'Family', with a confused expression on their face. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A person stands at a crossroads on a path, one fork clearly labeled 'Work' and the other labeled 'Family', with a confused, contemplative expression on their face. Clean flat vector art style, high contrast, no shading or gradients. Pure, seamless white background. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The mood conveys internal conflict and indecision.
